locations.name: 庫克敦
locations.summary: 庫克敦(英語：Cooktown)，是澳洲昆士蘭州庫克郡的一個城鎮，濱臨珊瑚海，面向大堡礁。該城位處首府布里斯本北方約2000公里，凱恩斯以北331公里處。在2011年人口普查時有人口2339人。 庫克敦位處遠北昆士蘭約克角半島奮進河河口處…

locations.name: Ingham, Queensland
locations.summary: Ingham is a rural town and locality in the Shire of Hinchinbrook, Queensland, Australia.

relations.subject: Pied monarch
relations.evidence: The pied monarch is found in tropical forest edge habitats and secondary growth in coastal north eastern Queensland, from Cooktown to Ingham
